languages.text: "Мы с Нунциусом принадлежим к тайной секте Ксенаритов. Наш путь Познания — изучение ксенотехнологий на благо Империума. Многие из {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}духовенства Марса{/g}, весьма ограниченно трактуя заветы Омниссии, считают наш путь еретической схизмой. Пройдя посвящение на Стигии VIII, мы вместе с Нунциусом искали образцы ксенотеха некронов — задача почти невозможная и оттого интересная. В одной из экспедиций мы вступили в конфликт с другими техножрецами — нас ждала смерть, но Инквизиция, втайне наблюдавшая за нашими исследованиями, решила, что мы будем полезнее живыми. Естественно, о том, что именно Инквизиция стояла за вмешательством, мы узнали лишь на Амсанкте".

traits.locale_text: "Мы с Нунциусом принадлежим к тайной секте Ксенаритов. Наш путь Познания — изучение ксенотехнологий на благо Империума. traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "Nuncius and I belong to a secret sect of xenarites. Our path of Knowledge is the study of xenotechnology for the benefit of the Imperium. Many of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Priesthood of Mars{/g}, who interpret the precepts of the Omnissiah very narrowly, deem our path a heretical schism. After our ordination on Stygies VIII, Nuncius and I went searching for samples of Necron xenotech — a nearly impossible task, and thus, a fascinating one. On one such expedition, we came into conflict with other Tech-Priests — we were close to death, but the Inquisition, who had been observing our research in secret, decided that we would be more useful alive. Of course, it was only once we arrived on Amsanct that we learned that the Inquisition had been behind the confrontation."
languages.original_text: "Мы с Нунциусом принадлежим к тайной секте Ксенаритов. Наш путь Познания — изучение ксенотехнологий на благо Империума. languages.text: «Nuncius y yo formamos parte de una secta secreta de xenaritas. Nuestra senda del conocimiento consiste en estudiar xenotecnología para beneficio del Imperium. Muchos miembros del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}sacerdocio de Marte{/g}, cuya interpretación de los preceptos del Omnissiah es más estricta, consideran nuestro camino un cisma hereje. Tras ser ordenados en Stygies VIII, Nuncius y yo partimos en búsqueda de muestras de xenotecnología necrona. Es una tarea casi imposible y por lo tanto fascinante. En una de estas expediciones, entramos en conflicto con otros tecnosacerdotes. Estuvimos a punto de morir, pero la Inquisición, que nos había estado observando en secreto, decidió que seríamos más útiles vivos. Hasta que llegamos a Amasanct, no supimos que esa misma Inquisición había sido la responsable del enfrentamiento en primer lugar».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I belong to a secret sect of xenarites. Our path of Knowledge is the study of xenotechnology for the benefit of the Imperium. Of course, it was only once we arrived on Amsanct that we learned that the Inquisition had been behind the confrontation."

languages.text: “努恩修斯和我同属一个秘密的异形科技研究派系。我们的求知之路，在于研究异形科技以造福帝国。许多将欧姆尼赛亚的戒律做狭隘解读的{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}火星祭司{/g}视我们为异端。在斯泰吉斯8号上领受圣职后，努恩修斯和我便开始寻找太空死灵的异形科技样本——这是一项几乎不可能完成的任务，但也正因如此，才令人着迷。一次远征中，我们与其他技术神甫发生了冲突，濒临死亡；但一直暗中观察我们研究的审判庭认为，留我们活着更有用。当然，直到抵达阿姆桑克特后，我们才知道那场冲突背后的推手，正是审判庭。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I belong to a secret sect of xenarites. Our path of Knowledge is the study of xenotechnology for the benefit of the Imperium. Many of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Priesthood of Mars{/g}, who interpret the precepts of the Omnissiah very narrowly, deem our path a heretical schism. After our ordination on Stygies VIII, Nuncius and I went searching for samples of Necron xenotech — a nearly impossible task, and thus, a fascinating one. On one such expedition, we came into conflict with other Tech-Priests — we were close to death, but the Inquisition, who had been observing our research in secret, decided that we would be more useful alive. Of course, it was only once we arrived on Amsanct that we learned that the Inquisition had been behind the confrontation."

languages.text: « Nuncius et moi appartenons à une secte secrète de xénarites. La voie de la connaissance que nous suivons consiste en l'étude de la xénotechnologie dans l'intérêt de l'Imperium. De nombreux membres du {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Clergé de Mars{/g}, qui interprètent les préceptes de l'Omnimessie de manière très sectaire, considèrent notre voie comme un schisme hérétique. Après notre ordination sur Stygies VIII, Nuncius et moi sommes partis à la recherche d'échantillons de xénotechnologie appartenant aux Nécrons, une tâche quasi impossible et donc fascinante. Lors de l'une de ces expéditions, nous sommes entrés en conflit avec d'autres technoprêtres. Ils ont bien failli nous tuer, mais l'Inquisition, qui observait nos recherches en secret, a décidé que nous serions plus utiles vivants. Bien sûr, c'est seulement à notre arrivée sur Amsanct que nous avons appris que l'Inquisition était derrière cet affrontement. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I belong to a secret sect of xenarites. Our path of Knowledge is the study of xenotechnology for the benefit of the Imperium. Many of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Priesthood of Mars{/g}, who interpret the precepts of the Omnissiah very narrowly, deem our path a heretical schism. After our ordination on Stygies VIII, Nuncius and I went searching for samples of Necron xenotech — a nearly impossible task, and thus, a fascinating one. On one such expedition, we came into conflict with other Tech-Priests — we were close to death, but the Inquisition, who had been observing our research in secret, decided that we would be more useful alive. Of course, it was only once we arrived on Amsanct that we learned that the Inquisition had been behind the confrontation."

languages.text: "Nuncius ve ben, gizli bir zenarit tarikatına mensubuz. İrfan yolumuz, İmparatorluk'un yararı için zeno teknolojisinin incelenmesidir. Hermesih'in kurallarını çok dar yorumlayan {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Mars Rahipliği{/g}, yolumuzu kâfirce bir bölünme olarak görür. Stygies VIII'deki tertibimizin ardından Nuncius ve ben, Nekron zeno teknolojisi örneklerini aramaya gittik. Bu, neredeyse imkânsız ve bundan ötürü büyüleyici bir görevdi. Böyle bir keşif seferinde diğer Tekno Rahiplerle çatışmaya girdik. Ölümün ucundan döndük ama araştırmamızı gizlice izleyen Engizisyon, hayatta kalmamızın daha faydalı olacağımıza karar verdi. Tabii o çatışmanın ardında Engizisyon'un olduğunu ancak Amsanct'a vardığımızda öğrendik."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I belong to a secret sect of xenarites. Our path of Knowledge is the study of xenotechnology for the benefit of the Imperium. Many of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Priesthood of Mars{/g}, who interpret the precepts of the Omnissiah very narrowly, deem our path a heretical schism. After our ordination on Stygies VIII, Nuncius and I went searching for samples of Necron xenotech — a nearly impossible task, and thus, a fascinating one. Of course, it was only once we arrived on Amsanct that we learned that the Inquisition had been behind the confrontation."

Tabii o çatışmanın ardında Engizisyon'un olduğunu ancak Amsanct'a vardığımızda öğrendik."

languages.text: "Nuncius und ich gehören einer geheimen Sekte von Xenariten an. Unser Weg des Wissens ist das Studium von Xenotechnologie zum Vorteil des Imperiums. Viele Mitglieder der {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Priesterschaft des Mars{/g}, die die Gebote des Omnissiah sehr streng auslegen, sehen in unserem Weg ein häretisches Schisma. Nach unserer Weihe auf Stygies VIII suchten Nuncius und ich nach Beispielen für die Xenotech der Necron ... ein nahezu unmögliches, aber faszinierendes Unterfangen. Auf einer unserer Expeditionen gerieten wir in Konflikt mit unseren Techpriestern ... wir waren dem Tode nah, aber die Inquisition, die unsere Forschung insgeheim verfolgt hatte, beschloss, dass wir lebend mehr wert wären. Natürlich erfuhren wir erst nach unserer Ankunft auf Amsanct, dass die Inquisition für die Konfrontation verantwortlich war."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I belong to a secret sect of xenarites. Our path of Knowledge is the study of xenotechnology for the benefit of the Imperium. Many of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Priesthood of Mars{/g}, who interpret the precepts of the Omnissiah very narrowly, deem our path a heretical schism. Natürlich erfuhren wir erst nach unserer Ankunft auf Amsanct, dass die Inquisition für die Konfrontation verantwortlich war."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスと私はゼナライトの秘密宗派に属している。私たちの知識の道は、インペリウムの利益のためのゼノテクノロジーの研究です。{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}マーズの神権者{/g}の多くは、オムニサイアの戒律を非常に狭く解釈しており、私たちの道を異端の分裂主義とみなしています。スティージスVIIIで聖職に就いた後、ヌンキウスと私はネクロンのゼノテックのサンプルを探しに行った。私たちは死にかけたが、私たちの研究を秘密裏に観察していた異端審問官は、私たちが生きていたほうが役に立つと判断した。もちろん、アムサンクトに到着して初めて、異端審問官がこの対立の背後にいたことを知った。」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius and I belong to a secret sect of xenarites. Our path of Knowledge is the study of xenotechnology for the benefit of the Imperium. Many of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Priesthood of Mars{/g}, who interpret the precepts of the Omnissiah very narrowly, deem our path a heretical schism. On one such expedition, we came into conflict with other Tech-Priests — we were close to death, but the Inquisition, who had been observing our research in secret, decided that we would be more useful alive. Of course, it was only once we arrived on Amsanct that we learned that the Inquisition had been behind the confrontation."
